pokemon:cramorant.name: Cramorant
pokemon:cramorant.summary: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.
It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.
